home.title: Quick & Simple Utility Tools
home.description: Fast, free, and mobile-friendly tools for your everyday needs. No signup required.
home.about_p1: QuickBestGo is a global website providing various utility tools that are frequently needed in daily life. Our goal is to provide users with a fast, intuitive, and mobile-optimized experience.
home.about_p2: All tools are available directly in your browser without any registration or installation, and your data is processed only within your browser for privacy.
home.no_results: No tools found. Try a different keyword.

faq.q: What tools are available on QuickBestGo?
faq.a: QuickBestGo offers 20+ free utility tools including calculators (BMI, GPA, compound interest, tip, percentage, age, days between dates), health tools (calorie calculator), developer tools (Base64, URL encoder, JSON formatter, color converter), random tools (random number generator, password generator, coin flip, wheel spinner), converters (unit converter, timezone converter, QR code generator), and utilities (word counter).

faq.q: Are all the tools on QuickBestGo free?
faq.a: Yes. Every tool on QuickBestGo is completely free to use with no subscription, no registration, and no hidden fees.

faq.q: Do I need to create an account to use the tools?
faq.a: No account or sign-up is required. All tools work instantly in your browser — just open the page and start using them.

faq.q: Is my data safe when using QuickBestGo tools?
faq.a: Yes. All calculations and data processing happen entirely inside your browser. Nothing you type is ever sent to a server or stored anywhere.

faq.q: Which languages does QuickBestGo support?
faq.a: QuickBestGo is available in 5 languages: English, Korean (한국어), Spanish (Español), Japanese (日本語), and Portuguese (Português).

percentage_calculator.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage_calculator.meta_title: Percentage Calculator - Free Online Tool - QuickBestGo
percentage_calculator.meta_description: Calculate percentages quickly with our free online tool. Support for percentage of, percentage change, and more.
percentage_calculator.about_title: How to use the Percentage Calculator?
percentage_calculator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Percentage Calculator is a versatile tool designed to handle common percentage-related calculations. Whether you need to find a percentage of a number, determine what percentage one number is of another, or calculate percentage increases and decreases, this tool has you covered.
percentage_calculator.about_p2: The calculator now provides three modes: percent of a number, increase by percent, and decrease by percent. Enter your values and see results instantly.
percentage_calculator.about_p3: Examples: 15% of 200 = 30, 200 increased by 15% = 230, 200 decreased by 15% = 170.

faq.q: How do I calculate what percentage one number is of another?
faq.a: Divide the part by the whole, then multiply by 100. For example, 30 is 15% of 200 because (30 ÷ 200) × 100 = 15.

faq.q: How do I calculate a percentage increase?
faq.a: Enter the original value and the percentage, and the calculator adds that percentage to the original. For example, 200 increased by 15% equals 230.

faq.q: How do I calculate a discount or percentage decrease?
faq.a: Enter the original price and the discount percentage. The calculator subtracts that percentage to show the final price after the discount.

qr_code_generator.title: QR Code Generator
qr_code_generator.meta_title: QR Code Generator - Create QR Codes Online - QuickBestGo
qr_code_generator.meta_description: Create high-quality QR codes for any text, URL, or contact information with our free online tool. Download as PNG.
qr_code_generator.about_title: How to use the QR Code Generator?
qr_code_generator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's QR Code Generator allows you to instantly create QR codes for any text or URL you provide. Simply enter your content, and the QR code will be generated in real-time.
qr_code_generator.about_p2: You can use these QR codes for sharing website links, text messages, or any other information that can be scanned by a smartphone camera. It's a fast and efficient way to bridge physical and digital content.
qr_code_generator.about_p3: Your data is processed locally in your browser, ensuring that your information is never sent to our servers. Once generated, you can download the QR code as a PNG file for use in your projects.
qr_code_generator.error_dangerous_url: This URL scheme is not allowed for security reasons.

faq.q: How do I generate a QR code?
faq.a: Type or paste any URL, text, or contact information, and the QR code is generated instantly. You can download it as an image to use anywhere.

faq.q: What can I encode in a QR code?
faq.a: You can encode URLs, plain text, email addresses, phone numbers, Wi-Fi credentials, and more. The QR code can be scanned by any smartphone camera.

faq.q: Are the generated QR codes free to use?
faq.a: Yes, all QR codes generated on QuickBestGo are completely free with no usage restrictions or expiration.

random_number_generator.title: Random Number Generator
random_number_generator.meta_description: Generate a random number within your custom range quickly and easily. Free online tool for random selection, gaming, and more.
random_number_generator.about_title: What is a Random Number Generator?
random_number_generator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Random Number Generator is a tool that quickly and accurately generates random numbers between a minimum and maximum value specified by the user.
random_number_generator.about_p2: This tool can be used for various purposes, such as simple number selection, complex probability calculations, random event generation in games, or random number drawing for prize draws.
random_number_generator.about_p3: Our random number generator reflects the range entered by the user immediately and is designed to store the history of the generated numbers up to the latest 5 so that you can easily check previous results.
random_number_generator.error_min_max: Maximum must be greater than Minimum

faq.q: How do I generate a random number in a specific range?
faq.a: Set your minimum and maximum values, then click Generate. The tool instantly produces a cryptographically random number within your specified range.

faq.q: Is this random number generator truly random?
faq.a: The generator uses the browser's built-in secure random number API, producing high-quality random numbers suitable for games, decisions, and simulations.

faq.q: Can I see previously generated numbers?
faq.a: Yes, the generator keeps a history of recent results so you can track what numbers have been generated in your current session.

password_generator.title: Password Generator
password_generator.meta_description: Create secure and customizable passwords with our free online tool. Choose length and character types for maximum security.
password_generator.about_p1: In an era where digital security is more important than ever, a secure password is the first line of defense to protect your personal information. QuickBestGo's Password Generator maximizes your account security by generating unpredictable and complex passwords in seconds.
password_generator.about_p2: Our tool provides options to freely select whether to include uppercase letters, numbers, and special symbols, and you can set the desired length from 8 to up to 50 characters.
password_generator.about_p3: Since all password generation is performed in your local browser engine, there is no worry that the generated password will be recorded on the server or leaked through the network.

faq.q: How do I create a strong password?
faq.a: Use at least 12 characters combining uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols. Avoid dictionary words and personal information. Our generator creates strong passwords automatically.

faq.q: What makes a password secure?
faq.a: A secure password is long (12+ characters), random, and uses a mix of character types. Avoid reusing passwords across different accounts.

faq.q: Is my generated password stored anywhere?
faq.a: No. All password generation happens entirely in your browser. No data is sent to any server, and passwords are never stored or logged.

age_calculator.title: Age Calculator
age_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days with our free online tool. Just enter your birth date.
age_calculator.about_title: How does the Age Calculator work?
age_calculator.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Age Calculator is a tool that allows you to calculate your exact age in years, months, and days by simply entering your date of birth.
age_calculator.about_p2: The calculator takes into account the different number of days in months and leap years to provide highly accurate results.
age_calculator.about_p3: Your data is not sent to any server; the calculation happens entirely in your browser.

faq.q: How do I calculate my exact age?
faq.a: Enter your date of birth and click Calculate. The tool shows your exact age in years, months, and days based on today's date.

faq.q: How many days old am I?
faq.a: The age calculator shows your age broken down into years, months, and days. For total days, multiply years by 365 and add remaining months and days.

faq.q: Can I calculate someone else's age?
faq.a: Yes, simply enter any birth date to calculate the age of anyone — a family member, historical figure, or any date in the past.

coin_flip.title: Coin Flip
coin_flip.meta_title: Coin Flip - Heads or Tails - QuickBestGo
coin_flip.meta_description: Flip a digital coin for heads or tails with our free online tool. Perfect for quick decision making and games.
coin_flip.about_title: How to use the Coin Flip tool?
coin_flip.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Coin Flip is a simple digital tool that allows you to flip a coin and get a random result of Heads or Tails.
coin_flip.about_p2: This tool is perfect for making quick decisions, settling bets, or as a random element in games when you don't have a physical coin on hand.
coin_flip.about_p3: The results are generated using a cryptographically secure random number generator in your browser, ensuring fairness and unpredictability.

faq.q: How does an online coin flip work?
faq.a: Click the flip button and the simulator uses a secure random algorithm to determine heads or tails — each outcome has an equal 50% probability.

faq.q: Is an online coin flip truly fair?
faq.a: Yes. The coin flip uses a cryptographically secure random number generator, ensuring each flip is completely independent with an equal 50/50 chance.

faq.q: Can I use this coin flip to make decisions?
faq.a: Absolutely. It's great for settling disputes, making random choices, or any situation where you need an unbiased 50/50 decision.

wheel_spinner.title: Wheel Spinner
wheel_spinner.meta_title: Wheel Spinner - Random Name Picker - QuickBestGo
wheel_spinner.meta_description: Spin a custom wheel to pick a random winner or make a quick decision with our free online tool. Enter your own options.
wheel_spinner.about_title: How to use the Wheel Spinner?
wheel_spinner.about_p1: QuickBestGo's Wheel Spinner is a fun and interactive way to make a random selection from a list of options.
wheel_spinner.about_p2: Simply enter your choices, one per line, and spin the wheel to pick a random winner. It's great for classrooms, giveaways, or deciding what to have for dinner!
wheel_spinner.about_p3: Like all our tools, it runs entirely in your browser and doesn't store any of your inputs on our servers.

faq.q: How do I use the wheel spinner?
faq.a: Add your custom options or names to the wheel, then click Spin. The wheel rotates and randomly selects one option with equal probability for each entry.

faq.q: Can I add custom options to the spinner?
faq.a: Yes. You can enter any list of items — names, choices, prizes — and the wheel will display and randomly select from your custom options.

faq.q: Is the wheel spinner selection random?
faq.a: Yes. Each spin uses a secure random algorithm, giving every item on the wheel an equal chance of being selected.

bmi_calculator.title: BMI Calculator
bmi_calculator.meta_title: BMI Calculator - Free Body Mass Index Tool - QuickBestGo
bmi_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) instantly with our free online tool. Supports both metric (cm/kg) and imperial (ft/lb) units.
bmi_calculator.about_title: What is BMI and how is it calculated?
bmi_calculator.about_p1: Body Mass Index (BMI) is a simple numerical value calculated from a person's height and weight. It is widely used as a screening tool to identify weight categories that may lead to health problems. The formula is: BMI = weight (kg) / height (m)².
bmi_calculator.about_p2: BMI categories are defined by the World Health Organization (WHO): Underweight is below 18.5, Normal weight is 18.5–24.9, Overweight is 25–29.9, and Obese is 30 or above. These ranges apply to most adults aged 18–65.
bmi_calculator.about_p3: BMI is a useful screening tool but does not directly measure body fat or overall health. Factors such as muscle mass, age, sex, and ethnicity can affect the interpretation. Always consult a healthcare professional for a comprehensive health assessment.
bmi_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter valid height and weight values.

faq.q: What is BMI and how is it calculated?
faq.a: BMI (Body Mass Index) is calculated by dividing your weight in kilograms by the square of your height in meters (kg/m²). It categorizes weight as underweight, normal, overweight, or obese.

faq.q: What is a healthy BMI range?
faq.a: A BMI of 18.5–24.9 is considered normal/healthy. Under 18.5 is underweight, 25–29.9 is overweight, and 30 or above is classified as obese.

faq.q: Is BMI an accurate measure of health?
faq.a: BMI is a useful screening tool but has limitations — it doesn't account for muscle mass, bone density, age, or body fat distribution. Consult a healthcare professional for a comprehensive assessment.

footer.tagline: Fast, Simple, and Free Utility Tools.

meta.title: QuickBestGo - Fast & Simple Utility Tools
meta.description: A collection of simple, fast, and free online utility tools. Random number generator, password generator, age calculator, and more.

about_page.meta_description: Learn about QuickBestGo, our mission to provide free, fast, and privacy-friendly utility tools for everyone.
about_page.title: About QuickBestGo
about_page.mission_p1: QuickBestGo was created with a simple goal: to provide fast, free, and easy-to-use online utility tools for everyone, without registration, without installation, and without compromising your privacy.
about_page.mission_p2: We believe that everyday digital tools should be accessible to everyone, everywhere. That's why all our tools work directly in your browser and support multiple languages.
about_page.tools_p1: We currently offer 7 free utility tools: Random Number Generator, Password Generator, Coin Flip, Wheel Spinner, Age Calculator, QR Code Generator, and Percentage Calculator. We are continuously working to add more useful tools.
about_page.privacy_p1: All calculations and operations are performed locally in your browser. We do not collect, store, or transmit any of the data you input into our tools. Your privacy is our priority.

contact_page.meta_description: Contact the QuickBestGo team for questions, feedback, or support.
contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact_page.response_time: We typically respond within 1–3 business days.
contact_page.feedback_p1: We are always looking to improve QuickBestGo. If you have ideas for new tools or improvements to existing ones, please reach out — we'd love to hear your suggestions.
contact_page.success_message: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 1–3 business days.
contact_page.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

privacy_policy_page.meta_description: Read the QuickBestGo privacy policy to understand how we handle your data and use of Google AdSense.
privacy_policy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy_page.intro: At QuickBestGo, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our website at https://quickbestgo.com.
privacy_policy_page.s1_content: QuickBestGo does not collect or store any personal information through our tools. All tool operations — including number generation, password creation, age calculation, and QR code generation — are performed entirely within your browser. No data you enter is transmitted to our servers.
privacy_policy_page.s2_content: We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to analyze website traffic and improve your experience. We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our site. This data is aggregated and anonymous. You can opt out of Google Analytics by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
privacy_policy_page.s3_content: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements on our website. Google AdSense uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites. You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ads Settings at https://www.google.com/settings/ads.
privacy_policy_page.s4_content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit.
privacy_policy_page.s5_content: Our services are not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy_policy_page.s6_content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy_policy_page.contact_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please reach out via our contact page.

calorie_calculator.title: Calorie Calculator
calorie_calculator.meta_title: Calorie Calculator - Daily Calorie Needs (BMR & TDEE) - QuickBestGo
calorie_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your daily calorie needs based on age, height, weight, and activity level. Free online BMR and TDEE calculator.
calorie_calculator.about_title: How does the Calorie Calculator work?
calorie_calculator.about_p1: Our Calorie Calculator uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, the most accurate formula for estimating your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) — the number of calories your body burns at complete rest.
calorie_calculator.about_p2: Your BMR is multiplied by an activity factor to calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE). This is the number of calories you need to maintain your current weight.
calorie_calculator.about_p3: To lose weight, aim for a 500 kcal/day deficit. To gain weight, add 500 kcal/day. All calculations are performed locally in your browser and no data is sent to our servers.
calorie_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter valid values for all fields.

faq.q: How many calories should I eat per day?
faq.a: Daily calorie needs depend on your age, gender, height, weight, and activity level. The calculator uses the Mifflin-St Jeor formula to estimate your BMR and TDEE.

faq.q: What is the difference between BMR and TDEE?
faq.a: BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate) is the calories your body needs at complete rest. TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) accounts for your activity level and shows total daily calorie needs.

faq.q: How many calories do I need to lose weight?
faq.a: A deficit of 500 calories per day typically leads to about 0.5 kg (1 lb) of weight loss per week. The calculator shows your maintenance calories to help you plan.

compound_interest_calculator.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compound_interest_calculator.meta_title: Compound Interest Calculator - Free Investment Growth Tool - QuickBestGo
compound_interest_calculator.meta_description: Calculate the future value of your investment with our free compound interest calculator. See how your money grows over time with different compounding frequencies.
compound_interest_calculator.about_p1: Compound interest is interest calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods. Unlike simple interest, compound interest grows exponentially over time, which is why it is often called 'the eighth wonder of the world'.
compound_interest_calculator.about_p2: The formula is: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt), where P is the principal, r is the annual interest rate, n is the number of times interest compounds per year, and t is the time in years. The more frequently interest compounds, the greater the final amount.
compound_interest_calculator.about_p3: This calculator is for informational and educational purposes only. Results are estimates based on the inputs provided and do not constitute financial advice.
compound_interest_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter valid positive numbers for all fields.

faq.q: What is compound interest?
faq.a: Compound interest is interest calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods, causing investments to grow exponentially over time.

faq.q: How often should interest compound?
faq.a: More frequent compounding yields more — daily > monthly > annual. However, the difference is smaller than you'd expect. Comparing APY (Annual Percentage Yield) across accounts gives the most accurate comparison.

faq.q: What is the Rule of 72?
faq.a: Divide 72 by the annual interest rate to estimate how many years it takes to double your money. For example, at 6% interest: 72 ÷ 6 = 12 years to double.

faq.q: How does monthly contribution affect my savings?
faq.a: Monthly contributions significantly amplify compound growth. Even small regular additions can far outpace a one-time lump sum investment over the long term due to the compounding effect on each contribution.

faq.q: What is inflation-adjusted return?
faq.a: The real (inflation-adjusted) value shows the future amount in today's purchasing power. Subtract the inflation rate from your nominal return to get the real return — e.g., 7% nominal minus 2.5% inflation = ~4.5% real return.

tip_calculator.title: Tip Calculator
tip_calculator.meta_title: Tip Calculator - Split Bill & Calculate Tip - QuickBestGo
tip_calculator.meta_description: Calculate the tip amount and split your bill easily with our free tip calculator. Choose your tip percentage and divide among any number of people.
tip_calculator.about_title: How to use the Tip Calculator?
tip_calculator.about_p1: Our Tip Calculator makes it easy to calculate a tip and split a bill among multiple people. Simply enter the total bill amount, select or enter your desired tip percentage, and choose how many people are splitting the bill.
tip_calculator.about_p2: Tipping customs vary by country and culture. In the United States, 15–20% is standard for restaurant service. In other countries, tipping may not be customary or a service charge may already be included.
tip_calculator.about_p3: All calculations are performed instantly in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
tip_calculator.error_invalid: Please enter a valid bill amount.
tip_calculator.no_tip_culture: Tipping is not common in this region.

faq.q: How do I calculate a tip?
faq.a: Enter your bill amount, select a tip percentage (10–25% is common), and the calculator instantly shows the tip amount, total, and per-person share if splitting.

faq.q: What percentage should I tip at a restaurant?
faq.a: In the US, 15–20% is standard for restaurant service. 10% is considered low, while 25%+ is for exceptional service. Tipping customs vary by country.

faq.q: How do I split a bill among multiple people?
faq.a: Enter the bill amount and tip percentage, then set the number of people. The calculator divides the total equally and shows each person's share.

unit_converter.title: Unit Converter
unit_converter.meta_title: Unit Converter - Length, Weight, Temperature & Volume - QuickBestGo
unit_converter.meta_description: Convert between metric and imperial units instantly. Free online converter for length (km/mi), weight (kg/lb), temperature (°C/°F), and volume (L/gal).
unit_converter.about_title: How to use the Unit Converter?
unit_converter.about_p1: Our Unit Converter supports four categories: Length (kilometers, miles, meters, feet, centimeters, inches), Weight (kilograms, pounds, grams, ounces), Temperature (Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin), and Volume (liters, US gallons, milliliters, fluid ounces).
unit_converter.about_p2: Select a category, enter your value, choose the source and target units, and the result is calculated instantly. You can also swap the units with a single click.
unit_converter.about_p3: All conversions use internationally accepted conversion factors. Results are rounded to 4 decimal places for precision.

faq.q: What units can I convert?
faq.a: The converter supports length, weight, temperature, and volume — covering dozens of unit pairs including metric and imperial systems.

faq.q: How accurate is the unit converter?
faq.a: The converter uses precise conversion factors and handles common unit pairs accurately. Results are displayed to four decimal places.

faq.q: Can I convert Celsius to Fahrenheit?
faq.a: Yes. Select Temperature as the category, choose Celsius as the input unit and Fahrenheit as the output, then enter your value.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64.meta_title: Base64 Encoder & Decoder - Free Online Tool - QuickBestGo
base64.meta_description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to plain text instantly. Free online Base64 converter for developers.
base64.about_p1: Base64 is an encoding scheme that converts binary data into a text format using 64 ASCII characters (A–Z, a–z, 0–9, +, /). It is widely used in web development to embed images in CSS, encode email attachments, and transmit data in JSON payloads.
base64.about_p2: Encoding increases the data size by approximately 33%, but ensures safe transmission over text-based protocols. Base64 is not encryption — it is purely an encoding scheme and can be decoded by anyone.
base64.about_p3: All encoding and decoding is performed locally in your browser. No data is ever sent to our servers.

faq.q: What is Base64 encoding?
faq.a: Base64 is a method that converts binary data into ASCII text using 64 characters (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, +, /). It's commonly used for embedding data in HTML, CSS, or APIs.

faq.q: How do I encode text to Base64?
faq.a: Paste your text in the input field and select Encode. The Base64 equivalent is shown instantly and can be copied to clipboard.

faq.q: What is Base64 used for?
faq.a: Base64 is used to embed images in CSS, send binary data in JSON APIs, encode email attachments, and safely transmit data in URLs.

url_encoder.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
url_encoder.meta_title: URL Encoder & Decoder - Free Online Tool - QuickBestGo
url_encoder.meta_description: Encode or decode URLs and query parameters instantly. Free online URL percent-encoding tool for developers.
url_encoder.about_p1: URL encoding (percent-encoding) replaces special characters with a % sign followed by two hexadecimal digits. For example, a space becomes %20 and & becomes %26. This ensures URLs are valid and can be safely transmitted over the internet.
url_encoder.about_p2: URL decoding reverses this process, converting percent-encoded sequences back to their original characters. This is commonly used when parsing query strings, handling form submissions, or debugging API requests.
url_encoder.about_p3: This tool uses the standard encodeURIComponent / decodeURIComponent functions, which encode all characters except letters, digits, -, _, ., and ~.
url_encoder.placeholder_encode: Enter URL or text to encode...

faq.q: What is URL encoding?
faq.a: URL encoding converts special characters into a format that can be safely transmitted in a URL. For example, spaces become %20 and & becomes %26.

faq.q: Why do I need to encode a URL?
faq.a: URLs can only contain a limited set of characters. Encoding ensures special characters like spaces, quotes, and symbols are safely included without breaking the URL structure.

faq.q: How do I decode a URL?
faq.a: Paste the encoded URL and select Decode. The tool converts percent-encoded characters back to their original readable form.

json_formatter.title: JSON Formatter
json_formatter.meta_title: JSON Formatter & Validator - Free Online Tool - QuickBestGo
json_formatter.meta_description: Format, beautify, validate, and minify JSON instantly. Free online JSON formatter with error highlighting for developers.
json_formatter.about_title: How to use the JSON Formatter?
json_formatter.about_p1: Paste your JSON into the input area and click Format to beautify it with proper indentation, or Minify to compress it into a single line. The validator will highlight any syntax errors and show you exactly where the problem is.
json_formatter.about_p2: Valid JSON uses double quotes for keys and string values, supports numbers, booleans (true/false), null, arrays ([]), and objects ({}). Common mistakes include trailing commas, single quotes, and unquoted keys.
json_formatter.about_p3: All processing is done locally in your browser. Large JSON files are supported and no data is sent to any server.

faq.q: What does a JSON formatter do?
faq.a: It takes raw or minified JSON text and reformats it with proper indentation and line breaks, making it easy to read and debug.

faq.q: How do I validate JSON online?
faq.a: Paste your JSON into the formatter. If it's valid, it will be formatted cleanly. If there's a syntax error, the tool will highlight the problem.

faq.q: Does the JSON formatter compress data?
faq.a: Yes. You can both format (prettify) JSON for readability and minify it to remove whitespace for smaller file sizes.

color_converter.title: Color Converter
color_converter.meta_title: Color Converter - HEX, RGB & HSL - QuickBestGo
color_converter.meta_description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats instantly. Free online color picker and converter for designers and developers.
color_converter.about_title: How to use the Color Converter?
color_converter.about_p1: Enter a color in any format — HEX (#RRGGBB), RGB (rgb(r, g, b)), or HSL (hsl(h, s%, l%)) — and the other formats are calculated instantly. You can also use the color picker to select any color visually.
color_converter.about_p2: HEX is the most common format in web development (CSS, HTML). RGB defines colors by red, green, and blue channels (0–255 each). HSL represents colors by hue (0–360°), saturation (0–100%), and lightness (0–100%), which is more intuitive for adjusting colors.
color_converter.about_p3: All conversions use standard color space formulas and are performed locally in your browser.

faq.q: How do I convert HEX to RGB?
faq.a: Enter a HEX color code (e.g., #2563eb) and the converter instantly shows the equivalent RGB, HSL, and other color format values.

faq.q: What is the difference between HEX and RGB colors?
faq.a: HEX is a 6-digit hexadecimal code used in web design. RGB represents the same color as three values (0–255) for Red, Green, and Blue components.

faq.q: How do I find the color format I need for CSS?
faq.a: The converter shows HEX, RGB, and HSL formats simultaneously, so you can copy the exact format required for your CSS or design tool.

gpa_calculator.title: GPA Calculator
gpa_calculator.meta_title: GPA Calculator - Calculate Your Grade Point Average - QuickBestGo
gpa_calculator.meta_description: Calculate your GPA on a 4.0 scale with our free online GPA calculator. Add courses with grades and credit hours for an accurate cumulative GPA.
gpa_calculator.about_p1: GPA (Grade Point Average) is calculated by multiplying each course's grade points by its credit hours, summing those values, and dividing by the total credit hours. For example: A (4.0) × 3 credits + B (3.0) × 4 credits = 24 points ÷ 7 credits = 3.43 GPA.
gpa_calculator.about_p3: GPA scales and grading systems vary by institution and country. This calculator uses the common US 4.0 scale as a general reference.
gpa_calculator.error_no_courses: Please add at least one course.
gpa_calculator.error_invalid_credits: Please enter valid credit hours for all courses.

faq.q: How is GPA calculated?
faq.a: GPA is calculated by multiplying each course's grade points by its credit hours, summing those values, then dividing by the total credit hours.

faq.q: What is a good GPA?
faq.a: On a 4.0 scale, 3.5–4.0 is excellent (Dean's List), 3.0–3.5 is good, 2.0–3.0 is average, and below 2.0 may indicate academic difficulty.

faq.q: How do I convert letter grades to grade points?

word_counter.title: Word Counter
word_counter.meta_title: Word Counter - Free Online Word & Character Count Tool - QuickBestGo
word_counter.meta_description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time instantly. Free online word counter for writers, students, and SEO professionals.
word_counter.about_p1: Our Word Counter instantly analyzes your text and provides a comprehensive breakdown: total word count, character count (with and without spaces), sentence count, paragraph count, and estimated reading time based on an average reading speed of 200 words per minute.
word_counter.about_p2: Writers use word counters to meet assignment requirements, stay within social media character limits (Twitter: 280, Instagram: 2,200), and track their writing progress. SEO professionals use it to optimize meta descriptions (150–160 characters) and title tags (50–60 characters).
word_counter.about_p3: The keyword density section shows the top 5 most frequently used meaningful words in your text, helping you identify overused words and improve readability.
word_counter.label_input: Enter or paste your text here
word_counter.placeholder: Start typing or paste your text here to analyze...

faq.q: How do I count words in text?
faq.a: Paste or type your text into the input area. The word count, character count, sentence count, and reading time are updated instantly.

faq.q: Does the word counter include spaces in the character count?
faq.a: The tool shows both character count with spaces and without spaces, so you can use whichever metric you need.

faq.q: Is there a text length limit?
faq.a: The tool handles up to 100,000 characters. For most documents, essays, and articles, this is more than sufficient.

days_between_dates.title: Days Between Dates Calculator
days_between_dates.meta_title: Days Between Dates Calculator - Free Online Tool - QuickBestGo
days_between_dates.meta_description: Calculate the exact number of days, weeks, months, and working days between two dates. Free online date difference calculator.
days_between_dates.about_title: How to calculate days between dates?
days_between_dates.about_p1: Our Days Between Dates Calculator gives you the exact difference between any two dates in multiple units: total days, complete weeks, approximate months, years, and working days (Monday to Friday).
days_between_dates.about_p2: Use the quick preset buttons to instantly calculate common date ranges — the next 7 days, 30 days, 100 days, or a full year from today. You can also enter any custom start and end dates.
days_between_dates.about_p3: Common uses include calculating deadlines, project timelines, countdowns to events (holidays, birthdays, anniversaries), and determining how long ago something happened.
days_between_dates.error_invalid: Please select valid start and end dates.

faq.q: How do I calculate the number of days between two dates?
faq.a: Select a start date and end date, then click Calculate. The tool shows the exact difference in days, weeks, months, and years.

faq.q: How many working days are between two dates?
faq.a: The calculator includes a working days result that excludes weekends, useful for project planning and business deadlines.

faq.q: Can I calculate how many days until a future date?
faq.a: Yes. Set today as the start date and your future date as the end date to see exactly how many days remain.

timezone_converter.title: Timezone Converter
timezone_converter.meta_title: Timezone Converter - World Clock & Time Zone Tool - QuickBestGo
timezone_converter.meta_description: Convert times between any two time zones instantly. Free online timezone converter with live world clock for major cities worldwide.
timezone_converter.about_title: How to use the Timezone Converter?
timezone_converter.about_p1: Select your source timezone and enter a time, then choose a target timezone to see the converted time instantly. Use the swap button to reverse the conversion direction.
timezone_converter.about_p2: The live world clock at the bottom shows the current time in 6 major cities simultaneously — New York, London, Paris, Dubai, Tokyo, and Sydney — updated every second.
timezone_converter.about_p3: All timezone conversions use your browser's built-in Intl.DateTimeFormat API with IANA timezone data, ensuring accuracy for daylight saving time transitions and historical dates.

faq.q: How do I convert time between time zones?
faq.a: Select your source time zone, enter the time, then choose a target time zone. The converted time is shown instantly with daylight saving time accounted for.

faq.q: What is UTC?
faq.a: UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) is the global time standard. All time zones are defined as offsets from UTC — for example, UTC+9 is Japan Standard Time.

faq.q: How do I find the current time in another country?
faq.a: Select the target country's time zone and the tool displays the current local time there, automatically adjusted for daylight saving time.
